reviews.name: 뭉****
reviews.content:
가방 정말 가벼워요! 딱 아이 무게만큼만 느껴지는! 가방만 매고있으면 아무것도 안맨 것 처럼 느껴져요~! 
등길이 24에 몸무게2.7 아이 1사이즈 몸 잘 잡아주며 안정적이게 잘 맞아요~ 가방 넓게 쓰는 애들은 같은 스펙에도 2사이즈도 편하게 쓸 것 같아요!
포켓도 많고 컬러 소재 디자인 다 마음에 들어요~ 배송 받자마자 이것만 주구장창 가지고 다니고있어요~ 바잇미 세일에 가격도 좋게 구매했네요!
reviews.content_en: The bag is seriously so light! You only feel the weight of your pup! Just wearing the bag makes it feel like I'm not carrying anything at all~! My dog has a back length of 24cm and weighs 2.7kg, and size 1 fits perfectly and supports her body so stably~ Dogs who prefer roomy bags could probably comfortably use size 2 with the same specs! Lots of pockets and I love everything about the color, material, and design~ I've been carrying it around non-stop since it arrived~ Got a great deal on it during BITE ME's sale!

reviews.name: M****
reviews.content: 오우 너무 보들하고 예뻐요! 택배 오자마자 자기꺼라고 들어가서 안나오더라고요…? ㅋㅋ 위에 턱 괴는 부분이 딱딱하지 않아서 너무 좋고 어깨부분 끈이 폭신해서 5킬로그램이 넘는 강아지도 들쳐메고 다닐만 하다 싶어요! 일단 너무 포근해보여서 만족해요~~~ 가방 엄청 가리는 편인데 바로 타서 안내리네요 신기!!
reviews.content_en: Oh it's so soft and pretty! As soon as the package arrived, my pup claimed it as hers and wouldn't come out… ㅋㅋ The chin rest part on top isn't hard at all, which is great, and the shoulder straps are so padded that I think even a dog over 5kg could be comfortably carried around! It just looks so cozy and I'm satisfied~~~ I'm usually really picky about bags, but I put her in right away and she won't get out—it's amazing!!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
케이펫에서 구경하고 찜해놨었는데 마침 바잇미에서 쿠폰을..🤍

3.3kg 등길이27 1사이즈 딱! 맞았어요
2사이즈로 하고싶었는데 제가 키가 작아서 2사이즈가
너무 커보이더라구요ㅠㅠ

슬링백이라 산책할 때도 편하고 
카페에서 쉴 때는 쿠션처럼 펼쳐주면 되니까 
아이가 잘 쓸 것 같아요🤍
reviews.content_en:
I saw it on K-Pet and wishlisted it, and then BITE ME had a coupon~ 🤍

3.3kg back length 27—size 1 is perfect!
I wanted size 2, but since I'm short, size 2 looked way too big 😭

Since it's a sling bag, it's convenient on walks, and when resting at a café I can just unfold it like a cushion, so I think my pup will use it well~ 🤍

reviews.name: 양****
reviews.content:
캐리어, 슬링백, 쿠션 다되는 가방 찾다가 글로시랑 엄청 고민하다 구매했습니다.
저희 포메 3.4키로에 등길이 30-31 정도 나오는데 딱 알맞아요
가지고 있는 캐리어가 큰사이즈로 했더니 너무 무겁고 커서 안그래도 체구가 작은 제가 들면 너무 버겁고 그래서 1사이즈로 했는데 여유롭진 않지만 딱 좋습니다
쿠션 넣으면 더 공간이 줄어들어 좀 빡빡한 느낌이 없지 않아 있는데 좋아요
3way 되는점과 귀엽고 깔끔한 디자인 모두 만족합니다
reviews.content_en: I searched for a bag that could do everything—carrier, sling bag, and cushion—and agonized between GLOSSY and this before buying. My Pomeranian is 3.4kg with a back length of about 30-31cm, and it's the perfect fit. My other carrier was oversized and too heavy, and since I'm small, it was too much for me to carry, so I went with size 1. It's not roomier but fits perfectly. Even with the cushion inserted taking up more space, there's a snug feeling but it's nice. Really satisfied with the 3-way functionality and the cute, clean design.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 푸딩이 녹아요~~ 엄첱 편하고 가벼워서 더 좋은 슬링백🩵
reviews.content_en: Pudding is melting~~ Such a convenient and lightweight sling bag! 🩵

reviews.name: 연****
reviews.content: 핸들로도 들 수 있는 가방 고르다가 멜로우백으로 결정!!  폭신해보여요~ 메쉬망도 같이 할 수 있어서 좋아요
reviews.content_en: I was choosing between bags with handles and decided on the MELLOW BAG!! Looks really plush~ Nice that you can use it with the mesh strap too!

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content:
히히 세일할때까지 기다리길 잘한듯!!
넘 가볍고 어깨도 안아프고 완전 이뻐요 ㅠㅠ
강아지가 들어가서 나오라니까 안나와요… ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: Hehe, so glad I waited for the sale!! It's super light, doesn't hurt my shoulders, and looks amazing ㅠㅠ My puppy gets in and won't come out when I tell her to… ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ

reviews.name: 나****
reviews.content: 가방 가볍고 넘 좋아여어 포근하게 잘 들어가있고 예쁩니당 세일하길 기다렸다 구매한건데 넘 만족 💝
reviews.content_en: The bag is light and so good! My pup settles in comfortably and it looks pretty! Waited for the sale to buy it and I'm so satisfied 💝

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
슬링백 다른브랜드꺼 사용중이었는데 수납공간도 적고 흐물거리고 어깨끈이 진짜 너무 불편했지만 비싸게 주고 사서 사용중이었는데 이 제품 보자마자 구매하고 그건 쳐박아뒀습니다 
넉넉한 수납공간과 짧은 끈이 있어서 잠깐씩 들고다닐수도 있어서 너무 좋아요
모양도 잘 잡혀있는 편이라 강아지가 잘 자요
reviews.content_en: I was using another brand's sling bag, but it had limited storage, was flimsy, and the shoulder straps were really uncomfortable. I paid a lot for it but kept using it, and as soon as I saw this product I bought it and put that one away. With plenty of storage space and a short strap, it's great because I can carry it around for quick trips too. The shape holds well so my pup sleeps comfortably.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
SSFW 마롱백을 첫번째 구입 할 때도 정말 많이 고민하고 구입했는데 너무 편하게
잘 사용하며 구입하길 참 잘했구나 생각했었는데 as 보내고 번갈아가며 사용 할 가방이 있으면 좋겠다는 생각에 또 다시 보고 또 보고 고민하다 이번에도 결국  제 선택은 SSFW 멜로우백이였어요.

방금 도착해 꺼내자마자 아는듯이 들어가 자리를 잡고는 스르르 잠이들어 버렸네요.
reviews.content_en: When I first bought the SSFW MARONG BAG, I thought a lot before purchasing, and I used it so conveniently that I felt I'd made a great choice. After sending it for A/S, I thought it would be nice to have a backup bag to rotate, so I looked at it again and again and agonized over it. In the end, my choice was SSFW MELLOW BAG again. It just arrived and the moment I pulled it out, my pup recognized it, settled right into her spot, and fell asleep smoothly.

reviews.name: 양****
reviews.content:
오픈하자마자 가방 이뻐서 한번 놀라고, 강아지가 쏙하고 들어가버려서 두번 놀라고 바로 택 제거해버렸습니다👍👍

그동안 가방을 몇개 실패했었는데 이건 푹신하면서도 너무 무너지지도 않아서 그런지 강아지가 편해하는것 같아요ㅎㅎ

바닥 쳐짐도 없고 가볍고 딱 좋은데 살짝 낮은감이 있어서 강아지가 앉아있을때는 좀 불안해서 손으로 잡고 다니긴 합니다..ㅠㅠ
reviews.content_en:
Right when I opened it, I was amazed at how pretty the bag is, then I was shocked again when my pup just dove right in—immediately cut off the tag 👍👍

I've had a few bag failures before, but this one is so cushiony yet doesn't collapse at all, so my pup seems comfortable 😊 No sagging on the bottom, it's light, and just right, but it feels a bit low, so when my pup sits in it I'm a little worried and hold onto it while carrying… 😭

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
사고 싶었는데 드디어 샀어요 시중에 슬링+옆면 흐물한 소재인 가방이 잘 없어서.. 핸들까지 달려있어서 편해요!
쿠션 느낌이라 카페에서 사용하기도 좋고 무게도 가벼워요~ 더스트백에 담겨오니 좋구요~ 6키로대 넣고 쳐짐 전혀 없어요! 
아쉬운 점은 마감이… 가격대비 이게 맞나 싶어요 밑판 테두리도 바닥면에서 보이고 이너쿠션도 많이 허접해요.. 배송도 다 구겨져서 와서.. 더 그렇네요 원래 이런 건지 리뉴얼되면서 저렴하게 제작한 건지는,, ssfw 다른 라인 제품은 퀄리티가 좋았어서 기대했는데 가방 퀄리티는 아쉬워요ㅜ
reviews.content_en: I wanted to buy this and finally did! It's hard to find sling bags with soft side panels, and it's convenient having a handle! It has a cushion feel so it's good for café use, and it's lightweight too~ Comes in a dust bag which is nice~ Put a 6kg dog in it with zero sagging! The downside is the finish… I'm not sure if this quality matches the price. The bottom panel edges show from the underside and the inner cushion feels pretty cheap too… It arrived all wrinkled too which makes it worse. I'm not sure if this is normal or if they made it cheaper during a redesign, but I had high expectations since SSFW's other product lines have good quality, so the bag quality is disappointing 😭

reviews.name: 황****
reviews.content:
저희 강아지는 2.4kg, 푸들인데 큰 사이즈는 클 것 같아서 작은 1 사이즈로 구매했어요 :)
가방은 너무 예쁘고 편한데 매쉬망이 생각보다 저희 강아지한테 너무 딱 맞아서 추가 안 하고 살걸 이라는 생각을 했습니다 ㅎㅎ.. 그래도 매쉬망이 필요한 때가 오겠지라는 생각으로 열심히 들고 다니려고요!
reviews.content_en: My dog is a 2.4kg Poodle, and the large size seemed like it would be too big, so I bought the small size 1 :) The bag is really pretty and comfortable, but the mesh strap fitted my pup so snugly that I thought I should've not added it… ㅎㅎ But I'm thinking there might be times when I need the mesh strap, so I'll carry it around diligently!

reviews.name: 양****
reviews.content:
여름에는 메고 다니기엔 좀 더울거 같은데 적당히 퐁신해서 카페에서 쉬기에는 좋은거 같아요

밑판 처짐 없고, 옆면도 너무 흐물거리거나 빳빳하지 않아서 좋습니다

3kg 깅아지가 쓰기에 사이즈 딱이에여
reviews.content_en: It might be a bit warm to carry in summer, but it's puffy enough and seems good for resting at a café. No sagging on the bottom, and the sides aren't too flimsy or stiff which is nice. Perfect size for a 3kg dog!

reviews.name: 노****
reviews.content_en: My pup is very satisfied ㅎㅎ It's the best!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content_en: Fast shipping and great product. Will use it well!

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 굉장히 가볍고 7키로도 안정적으로 슬링백 사용 가능해요!
reviews.content_en: Super lightweight and can comfortably use the sling bag even with a 7kg dog!

reviews.name: 권****
reviews.content: 사진을 못찍었지만 오자마자 강아지가 너무 좋아했어요~! 들어가서 냄새 맡고 부비면서 영역 표시를 하더라구요>.< 전에 쓰던 가방은 딱딱해서 카시트 용으로만 사용했는데 요거는 카시트도 되고 들고 다니기에도 정말정말 가벼워서 좋아요!😍 저희 애기는 등길이 30에 3.7키로인 5개월된 비숑인데 크기 적당하고 좋은것 같아요!
reviews.content_en: Didn't take photos but my dog loved it as soon as it arrived~! She went in, sniffed around, rubbed herself and did her scent marking 😝 The bag I used before was stiff so I only used it as a car seat, but this one works as a car seat AND is incredibly light to carry around 😍 My pup is a 5-month-old Bichon with a back length of 30cm and 3.7kg, and the size is perfect!

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content:
음.. 우선 별로인 가방은 아니에요
가볍고 디자인 좋고
근데 가격값을 하나..?
가방을 많이 구매해봤는데 이가격에 이정도 브랜즈 이름에 이런 마감은 처음이네요ㅜ
밑판 꺼내봤더니 테두리 울퉁불퉁 절단에 폼포드 마감스티커도 붙어있고 특히 안에 넣는 방석이 흐물흐물 너무 질이 별로에요ㅠ
그냥 딱딱한 바닥에 흐물방석 얹고 앉히는 느낌.
올때도 낮은 박스에 다 구겨져서 와서
전체적으로 괜찮지만 이가격은..ㅎ
reviews.content_en: Well… first of all it's not a bad bag. It's light, good design, but does it live up to the price…? I've bought lots of bags, and this finish for this price point at this brand name is my first time seeing it 😭 When I took out the bottom panel, the edges were all jagged from cutting and there were foam product finishing stickers attached. Especially the mat you put inside is super flimsy and poor quality 😭 It just feels like a hard bottom with a flimsy mat on top. It also arrived all wrinkled in a low box. Overall it's decent but this price…ㅎ
